name: etma-plugins
description: Open-source Claude Code plugins by ETMA

plugins.name: learn-from-video
plugins.description: Learn from any video — extract knowledge from YouTube, Vimeo, Loom, or local files using transcript + keyframe analysis

plugins.name: anf-website-builder
plugins.description: Build professional websites that don't look AI-generated using the ANIF Framework. Downloads real Unsplash photos, uses shadcn/ui + Magic UI components, and applies autoresearch-validated design patterns.
